label: 掩码轮廓提取
description: 基于8邻域边界的真正形态学轮廓提取。thickness>0：在掩码内部沿边界生成宽度为 thickness 的内轮廓；thickness<0：在掩码外部生成宽度为 |thickness| 的外环带（不含原掩码内部）；thickness=0：返回全零网格。输出为二值（1/0），原掩码数值会被丢弃。与「掩码边缘提取」(mask_edge) 的轴向极值边缘不同，本算子可正确勾勒凹陷与内部孔洞。
description-en: True morphological contour extraction based on the 8-neighborhood boundary. thickness>0: an inward outline of width `thickness` along the boundary inside the mask; thickness<0: an outward band of width `|thickness|` outside the mask (does NOT include the original mask interior); thickness=0: returns an all-zero grid. Output is binary (1/0) and the original mask values are dropped. Unlike the axis-extremal edge of Edge (mask_edge), this operator correctly outlines concave regions and interior holes.
icon: 扁平插画风格的小图标。画面是一个简洁的矩形轮廓框，外部黑色背景，轮廓线为明亮的橙黄色，内部填充深灰色，中间空心。风格干净，主色橙黄与深灰，突出「边缘/轮廓」的视觉概念。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 源网格，所有非零值视为掩码区域
inputs.description-en: Source grid; all non-zero values are treated as the mask region.

inputs.name: thickness
inputs.label: 轮廓厚度
inputs.description: 正数=在掩码内部生成宽度为该值的内轮廓；负数=在掩码外部生成宽度为其绝对值的外环带（不含原掩码内部）；0=返回全零网格。输出为二值（1/0）。
inputs.description-en: Positive = an inward outline of that width inside the mask; negative = an outward band of width equal to its absolute value outside the mask (excluding the original mask interior); 0 = an all-zero grid. Output is binary (1/0).

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 轮廓网格
outputs.description: 与输入等尺寸，轮廓区域=1，其余=0
outputs.description-en: Same size as input; outline area=1, elsewhere=0.
